questions.statement:
<p>Find the wrong term in the given series?</p>

<p>64, 34, 36, 56, 114, 287, 860</p>

<p>A series is given with one term missing. Select the correct alternative from the given ones that will complete the series.</p>

<p>MQ, SO, QU, WS, ?</p>
<p>Nitin points at a person in the photograph saying, &ldquo;He is the father of my only sister. How is Nitin&rsquo;s son related to the person in the photograph?</p>

<p>From the given answer-figures, select the figure in which the question - figure is contained :&nbsp;&nbsp;</p>

<p><img alt="" src="//storage.googleapis.com/tb-img/production/23/08/F1_Savita_Defence_9-8-23_D7.png" /></p>

<p>Choose the correct figure to replace the question mark.</p>

<p><img alt="" src="//storage.googleapis.com/tb-img/production/19/05/10_Shift%201_D18.PNG" style="width: 339px; height: 258px;" /></p>
questions.explanation:
<p>In figure B, the direction of arrows is opposite as of&nbsp;figure A (the rest of the figure remains the same). So, in D&nbsp;figure direction of arrow should be opposite of C&nbsp;figure.</p>
Hence, the correct answer is figure 2.

questions.statement:
<p>Select the option that is related to the fifth term in the same way as the second term is related to the first term and fourth term related to third term.</p>

<div>13 ∶&nbsp;130 <span style="">∶∶</span> 15 <span style="">∶</span> 180 <span style="">∶∶</span> 27 <span style="">∶</span> ?&nbsp;</div>

<p>If F means &#39;-&#39;,&nbsp;C means &#39;&times;&#39;, D means &#39;&divide;&#39;B means &#39;+&#39; then what will come in place of the question mark (?) in the following equation?</p>

<p>44 F 18 C 3 B 108 D 6 = ?</p>

Yoga covered a distance of 7 km straight from point E to F. From point F he took a right turn and covered a distance of 8 km to reach point G. From here he took a right turn and covered a distance of 7 km to reach point H. At point H he took a left turn and walked 3 km to reach point I. How far is he from the starting point?
